description: Material Passport for Stage 1 — Data Preparation. Tracks all artifacts produced during data cleaning, transformation, and validation.

required_artifacts.name: 原始数据
required_artifacts.description: Original unmodified data file(s) as received from the data source.

required_artifacts.name: 数据字典
required_artifacts.description: Variable names, labels, types, units, coding schemes, and value ranges.

required_artifacts.name: 清洗日志
required_artifacts.description: Record of all data cleaning actions: queries issued, discrepancies found, resolutions applied.

required_artifacts.name: 分析数据集
required_artifacts.description: Final cleaned dataset(s) ready for statistical analysis. Includes derived variables and recoded values.

required_artifacts.name: 变量清单
required_artifacts.description: Complete listing of all variables in the analysis dataset with metadata (name, label, type, source, derivation).

required_artifacts.name: 缺失数据摘要
required_artifacts.description: Summary of missing data patterns, counts, and percentages by variable and analysis population.

required_artifacts.name: 基线人口统计学摘要
required_artifacts.description: Baseline demographic and clinical characteristics of the analysis population.

optional_artifacts.name: 变量派生程序
optional_artifacts.description: R/Python/SAS programs used for variable derivation and transformation.

quality_gates.name: 数据完整性检查
quality_gates.description: All expected records are present; no duplicate records; unique identifiers are valid.

quality_gates.name: 变量范围检查
quality_gates.description: All values fall within expected ranges per the data dictionary.

quality_gates.name: 缺失模式检查
quality_gates.description: Missing data patterns are reviewed; no unexpected systematic missingness.

quality_gates.name: 分析人群一致性
quality_gates.description: Analysis population definitions (ITT, PP, safety) are consistently applied.
